session_20260531_193128_d0ca753f.content: what is the context of the docuemnt?

The context of the document appears to be a research article in the field of neurology, specifically focusing on the application of digital tools and artificial intelligence in the Myasthenia Gravis Core Examination (MG-CE).
based on the context what is the core appriach discussed in a paper?

The core approach discussed in the paper is the use of digital algorithms, computer vision, and artificial intelligence (AI) to analyze video recordings of the Myasthenia Gravis Core Examination (MG-CE) for telemedicine evaluations, with the goal of quantifying and objectifying the examination results.
what is the future enhancemnet can be done accoding to the paper?

According to the paper, future enhancements can include enabling trained non-physician healthcare providers to conduct precise examinations of patients with Myasthenia Gravis (MG) outside of conventional clinical settings, and enhancing the way the MG-CE is conducted to provide quantitative assessments that were previously unattainable.
okay what do you think what shoud be the modern apprach ca be taken mitigate mg as per taking the docuemnt as a reference

Based on the document, a modern approach to mitigate Myasthenia Gravis (MG) could be the integration of telemedicine, artificial intelligence (AI), and computer vision to develop a more precise and efficient diagnosis and monitoring system. This approach could include remote video examinations, automated analysis of patient data, and personalized treatment plans.
